name: Offline POS Synchronisation Status
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can monitor Offline POS synchronization status in "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": ", verifying that offline transactions uploaded successfully and terminals have current data from the cloud database. This helps optimize your retail operations by providing visibility into synchronization health, enabling proactive issue resolution, and ensuring data integrity across online and offline POS operations."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Offline POS uses visual indicators to represent the status of the synchronisation."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", [{"text": "View the Offline Status in Back Office"}], "data-id": "view-the-offline-status-in-back-office"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To access the Offline POS Servers status:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Reports > External Services > Offline POS Servers", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "A list of your Offline POS Servers will be displayed, along with an update on their status"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", 2023-07-08T223741.051.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "View the Offline Status in POS"}], "data-id": "view-the-offline-status-in-pos"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once the Offline POS installation is complete there will be a new icon when logging into POS."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The "}, {"text": "Offline Server Status", "bold": true}, {"text": " icon will be displayed in the top right of the POS screen. Initially the icon will be displayed as a minus sign ( - ) to indicate that your local PC is still synchronising information with your main cloud-based Retail Express database."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once the synchronisation is complete, the icon will change to display green, as per the screenshot below."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppVkpEAE.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppVkpEAE.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "offlinepos_statushighlight.jpg"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click the icon to view detailed information about the synchronisation status:"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppVkuEAE.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppVkuEAE.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip1 (68).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Offline POS requires only minimal maintenance, however, we do recommend you check the status each day to ensure your Offline Mode is ready and available immediately should you happen to lose your internet connection."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If the Offline Server is displaying Amber or Red please "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.retailexpress.com.au/contact", "children": [{"text": "contact us"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
